title: Popsicle Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by repeated deposit-transfer-collectFees-transfers in multiple pools

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls collectFees() after a flash loan in the same tx

red_flags: Repeated sequence of deposit-transfer-collectFees-transfers in multiple pools
monitoring_rules: BLOCK ANY TX THAT CALLS COLLECTFEES() IMMEDIATELY FOLLOWING A FLASHLOAN IN THE SAME TRANSACTION
summary: The attacker used a flash loan to repeatedly deposit, transfer, and collect fees across multiple pools, exploiting a bug in the fee accounting mechanism. A guard could have blocked such transactions by preventing collectFees() calls following a flash loan.
